items.title: Mumbai Indians coach Paras Mhambrey reflects on missed opportunities against KKR
items.summary: Mhambrey emphasises the importance of partnerships and acknowledges the team’s struggle to adapt to the challenging pitch conditions
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Duleep Trophy to kick off Indian domestic season; two-phase Ranji Trophy starts October 11
items.summary: The first part of the Ranji Trophy will be played between October and November, and the second phase between January and February
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: DR Congo cancel World Cup training camp over Ebola outbreak
items.summary: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
